# Vendored third-party libraries

These are bundled locally (not loaded from a CDN) because the captive portal
has no internet access until a device is paid up — every asset it serves
must be self-contained.

## qrcode-generator v1.4.4

- Source: https://github.com/kazuhikoarase/qrcode-generator
- File: `qrcode-generator.min.js` (minified with terser from the unmodified upstream `qrcode.js`)
- License: MIT

```
Copyright (c) 2009 Kazuhiko Arase

Licensed under the MIT license:
http://www.opensource.org/licenses/mit-license.php

The word "QR Code" is registered trademark of DENSO WAVE INCORPORATED
http://www.denso-wave.com/qrcode/faqpatent-e.html
```

## jsQR v1.4.0

- Source: https://github.com/cozmo/jsQR
- File: `jsQR.min.js` (minified with terser from the unmodified upstream `dist/jsQR.js`)
- License: Apache License, Version 2.0 (http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0)

Full license text: https://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
